case_title: BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL vs. WALDA, TEKESTE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 190 O'FARRELL ST #505, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL SERVED MAR-22-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL AS TO DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHULA, DHANSUKHLAL AS TO DEFENDANT WALDA, TEKESTE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
